prompt: A vast ultra-wide cinematic fantasy xianxia world map painted as a highly detailed Chinese cultivation sect panorama, viewed from an elevated distance above a sea of clouds. The scene shows a majestic mountain realm made of many steep rocky islands, waterfalls, mist-filled valleys, floating stone shards, ornate bridges, and layered traditional Chinese palace architecture with glowing mystical blue energy. In the center, place the grand main sect complex labeled "玄天剑宗", built on the tallest luminous mountain with white-blue crystal light, ascending pagodas, terraces, and celestial aura; nearby add the smaller label "宗门大殿". Surrounding it, include exactly 9 additional labeled locations distributed across the panorama: on the far left a purple-toned cliff region labeled "问剑崖" with the smaller annotation "弟子历练之地"; left-center a blue misty cultivation platform island labeled "悟道峰" with the smaller annotation "弟子悟道之地"; upper left a solemn hall cluster labeled "藏经阁" with the smaller annotation "典藏无上功法"; upper right a jagged icy mountain sword formation labeled "剑冢" with the smaller annotation "历代剑修终寝之地"; right-center a bright ceremonial complex labeled "演武场" with the smaller annotation "磨砺弟子心性"; lower right-center an alchemy pavilion area labeled "炼丹房" with the smaller annotation "炼丹疗法"; far right a pink flowering valley sanctuary labeled "百花谷" with the smaller annotation "入神绮艳秘境"; bottom right an outer compound labeled "外门" with the smaller annotation "新弟子居所". Add one title inscription in the upper left corner reading "玄天剑宗" in large gold calligraphy, with a smaller poetic line beneath it and a small red seal stamp. Use an elegant painted concept-art style, monumental scale, pale gold and icy blue highlights, soft volumetric fog, dramatic storm-clearing sky, ethereal lighting, and finely rendered Chinese ink-and-digital matte painting aesthetics. No characters in the foreground, no modern elements, just an expansive legendary sect environment designed like a promotional world-building illustration.
